name: Cinematic Video Prompt
description: Natural-language video generation prompt for cinematic live-action. Suitable for Runway, Kling, Sora, Pika.

shot: Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
negative: face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
